productName: Fireline Live Hash Rosin - Mars OG (I) - 01g
description: Hand-pressed indica rosin from Mars OG — solventless, full-spectrum, and prized by flavor chasers for a taste that stays honest to the living bud. Golden, terpy, and gentle on the lungs — with notes of pungent, earthy, and pine, with settle-in, melt-into-the-couch ease.
